A '''battle''' at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qretu 5]] was the result of a punitive strike conduced by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] against one of the off-world [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]]-producing colonies of [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]].

==Background==
The [[Xucphra Corporation]]'s [[Battle of Halanit|retaliation against Halanit]] induced [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to change its strategy to prevent [[Chief Operating Officer]] [[Ysanne Isard]] from further striking against innocent worlds. A list of viable targets was compiled, and the off-world [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferran]] [[Q5A7 Bacta Refinement Plant]] on [[Qretu 5]] was selected. The scope of the mission was to destroy the industrial facilities and to take away as much [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] as possible: the remainder was to be destroyed. The bacta requisitioned would then be given to traders in exchange of arms, munitions and spare parts. In this way, Ysanne Isard would be deprived of being able to retaliate for fear of alienating or antagonizing the traders.<ref name="Bacta" />

==The battle==
Rogue Squadron and its allies used the ring of asteroids surrounding the planet to enter the atmosphere discretely, and then arrived undetected at the bacta refinery by flying a low-level approach. Rogue Squadron made the first run, using [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] and [[Laser/Legends|laser]] fire to hit the ground targets. While [[Tal'dira]]'s [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[Chir'daki]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] was preparing to begin its run, a group of eight [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] piloted by [[Thyferran Home Defense Corps]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] joined the battle, but were soon shot down by Rogue Squadron and their allies. Having cleared the area of enemy forces, a convoy of independent [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers']] [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] led by [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax]] and [[Booster Terrik]] landed at a nearby [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], loaded their ships with bacta, and established contact with the local civilian population in anticipation of reparation claims.<ref name="Bacta" />

==Appearances==
